detectors.description: MiniMeToken.claimTokens(address) (CND.sol#1009-1029) ignores return value by token.transfer(controller,balance) (CND.sol#1025)
MiniMeToken.isContract(address) (CND.sol#949-963) is declared view but contains assembly code
detectors.markdown: [MiniMeToken.isContract(address)](CND.sol#L949-L963) is declared view but contains assembly code

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in MiniMeToken.approve(address,uint256) (CND.sol#451-485):
	External calls:
	- require(bool)(TokenController(controller).onApprove(msg.sender,_spender,_amount)) (CND.sol#473)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- allowed[msg.sender][_spender] = _amount (CND.sol#479)
	MiniMeToken.allowed (CND.sol#167) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- MiniMeToken.allowance(address,address) (CND.sol#499-505)
	- MiniMeToken.approve(address,uint256) (CND.sol#451-485)
	- MiniMeToken.transferFrom(address,address,uint256) (CND.sol#301-331)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [MiniMeToken.approve(address,uint256)](CND.sol#L451-L485):
	External calls:
	- [require(bool)(TokenController(controller).onApprove(msg.sender,_spender,_amount))](CND.sol#L473)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [allowed[msg.sender][_spender] = _amount](CND.sol#L479)
	[MiniMeToken.allowed](CND.sol#L167) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [MiniMeToken.allowance(address,address)](CND.sol#L499-L505)
	- [MiniMeToken.approve(address,uint256)](CND.sol#L451-L485)
	- [MiniMeToken.transferFrom(address,address,uint256)](CND.sol#L301-L331)

detectors.description:
Controlled.changeController(address) (CND.sol#75-79) should emit an event for: 
	- controller = _newController (CND.sol#77)

Reentrancy in MiniMeToken.generateTokens(address,uint256) (CND.sol#767-787):
	External calls:
	- curTotalSupply = totalSupply() (CND.sol#771)
		- parentToken.totalSupplyAt(min(_blockNumber,parentSnapShotBlock)) (CND.sol#653)
	- previousBalanceTo = balanceOf(_owner) (CND.sol#775)
		- parentToken.balanceOfAt(_owner,min(_blockNumber,parentSnapShotBlock)) (CND.sol#603)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- Transfer(0,_owner,_amount) (CND.sol#783)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in MiniMeToken.doTransfer(address,address,uint256) (CND.sol#347-423):
	External calls:
	- previousBalanceFrom = balanceOfAt(_from,block.number) (CND.sol#375)
		- parentToken.balanceOfAt(_owner,min(_blockNumber,parentSnapShotBlock)) (CND.sol#603)

	- previousBalanceTo = balanceOfAt(_to,block.number) (CND.sol#407)
		- parentToken.balanceOfAt(_owner,min(_blockNumber,parentSnapShotBlock)) (CND.sol#603)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- Transfer(_from,_to,_amount) (CND.sol#417)

detectors.description:
Version constraint ^0.4.15 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- KeccakCaching
	- EmptyByteArrayCopy
	- DynamicArrayCleanup
	- ImplicitConstructorCallvalueCheck
	- TupleAssignmentMultiStackSlotComponents
	- MemoryArrayCreationOverflow
	- privateCanBeOverridden
	- SignedArrayStorageCopy
	- UninitializedFunctionPointerInConstructor_0.4.x
	- IncorrectEventSignatureInLibraries_0.4.x
	- ExpExponentCleanup
	- NestedArrayFunctionCallDecoder
	- ZeroFunctionSelector.
It is used by:
	- ^0.4.15 (CND.sol#1)
